title: Printer Setup and Network Printer Troubleshooting
text:
Q: How do I set up a printer and troubleshoot network printer issues?
A: To set up a printer, follow these steps: Step 1: Connect the printer to a power source and turn it on. Step 2: For network printers, connect the printer to the network using an Ethernet cable or Wi-Fi. Step 3: On your computer, open 'Settings' and navigate to 'Devices' > 'Printers & Scanners'. Step 4: Click 'Add a printer or scanner' and select your printer from the list. Step 5: Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the installation. 

If you encounter issues with a network printer, try these troubleshooting steps: Step 1: Ensure the printer is powered on and connected to the same network as your computer. Step 2: Check for any error messages on the printer display. Step 3: Restart the printer and your computer. Step 4: Verify that the printer is set as the default printer in 'Printers & Scanners'. Step 5: If problems persist, run the 'Printer Troubleshooter' from 'Settings' > 'Update & Security' > 'Troubleshoot'. Step 6: If the issue is still unresolved, contact IT support for further assistance.
